tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Minnesota Twins vs. Kansas City Royals: Game Highlights) 2026/03/30 ESHEET

headlines.description: — The Kansas City Royals used home runs by Kyle Isbel and Isaac Collins, two hitters not known for their power, to defeat the Minnesota Twins 3-1 on an unseasonably warm day in front of a sellout crowd of 39,320 in Kansas City's home opener. The...
headlines.shortLinkText: Royals use rare long ball to defeat the Twins 3-1
